title: Marketplace Manager - Adidas India - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Adidas India - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Adidas India! We are hiring a Marketplace Manager for our Amritsar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Adidas India:
Adidas India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adidas India!
